top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Mirror trusted raw provider request and response hashes for normal-tiny candidate decisions.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: RawProviderEvidenceContract passes in mode_readiness after production mirror and refresh.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record deterministic normal-tiny assignment policy with seed, unit, assignment id, and assignment hash.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: RandomnessControlContract passes in mode_readiness after mirror and refresh.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Mirror final labels with label id, final status, outcome window closure, and supersession links.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: LabelFinalizationContract passes with zero malformed finalization records.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Mirror outcome window closure with window start, end, closed timestamp, and ordered lifecycle.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: OutcomeWindowCloseContract passes with zero malformed or order-violation records.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record completed rollout state with canary status and fleet hash map.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: DeploymentRolloutStateMachine passes and reports one valid rollout.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record worker heartbeats with consistent build, runtime config, and policy bundle hashes.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: WorkerFleetConsistencyContract passes without mixed hash violations.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record a successful restore drill with backup set id and restored world hash.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: BackupRestoreDrillContract passes with valid restored_world_hash.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record incident evidence freeze with frozen event range, config hash, and frozen timestamp.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: IncidentEvidenceFreezeContract passes with no frozen range violations.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record breaker resume only after root cause fixed, health checks passed, and evidence freeze id exists.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: CircuitBreakerResumeContract passes and references a frozen incident id.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record durable queue tasks with durable state, ack state, task id, and creation time.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: QueueDurabilityContract passes with valid durable and ack states.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record candidate cancellation events with cancellation reason, sequence, and timestamp.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: CandidateCancellationContract passes with nonnegative cancel_event_seq.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record bounded retry policy with backoff family, max concurrent retries, and p0 reserved capacity.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: RetryStormControlContract passes with bounded backoff policy.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record declared provider coverage by provider, chain, pool type, status, and unsupported reason.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: ProviderCoverageMapContract passes with at least one valid provider coverage map.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Record training and serving feature code hashes with normalization version and pass skew result.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: TrainingServingSkewContract passes with valid sha256 feature hashes.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Publish machine-readable matrix defining event, feature, label, and replay truth per evidence use.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: EvidenceEligibilityMatrix passes governance readiness validation.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Publish owned fix queue entries for every normal-tiny blocker with acceptance tests.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: TopFixQueueContract passes with no missing normal-tiny blocker entries.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Publish normal-tiny safety case linking hazards, mitigations, and readiness evidence.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: SafetyCaseContract passes with evidence links for readiness, waiver policy, and stop loss.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Publish non-waivable policy for normal-tiny blocking contracts.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: WaiverPolicyContract passes and normal-tiny blockers are non-waivable.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Verify unregistered and unsafe entry modes fail closed to observe-only or shadow.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: SafeDefaultContract passes and is absent from normal_tiny blockers.

top_fix_queue.first_fix_that_would_change_decision: Verify project stop loss is enabled with automatic watch-only downgrade action.
top_fix_queue.acceptance_test: ProjectStopLossContract passes and reports stop_automatic_entry true.

mitigations: ModeReadinessMatrix blocks normal_tiny until every required contract passes.
EvidenceEligibilityMatrix separates event, feature, label, and replay truth.
ProviderCoverageMapContract requires explicit unsupported_reason instead of inferred no quote.
ProjectStopLossContract downgrades unsafe entry modes to watch-only.
WaiverPolicyContract marks normal-tiny blocking contracts non-waivable.
